MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any parties, counsel, or other interested parties.

After noting the absence of appearances and the want of the required accounting, the Court ordered a citation issued to the Trustee, Barbara Simon, to appear on April 30, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 and to show cause as to why the required accounting has not been filed.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
